# `.github/workflows/lean_action_ci.yml`

## Source
- [`../../../.github/workflows/lean_action_ci.yml`](../../../.github/workflows/lean_action_ci.yml)

## Responsibilities
- Run repository CI checks on pushes, pull requests, and manual dispatch.
- Execute Lean build validation and doc harness diagnostics.

## Public Surface
- CI job definitions and execution triggers.

## Change Triggers
- CI policy updates.
- New project quality gates.
- Build/runtime environment changes.
